title: YetAnotherClientSideModpack
description: Yet another client-side vanilla modpack with a lot of usefull (or not) mods
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17d43afef11e884580c1f79745643e2816fdf163.png) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5f2bbe24d378d863f70c8b4bf7bf9c0ef2b56f7.png) ## What is it? It's just a modpack I play with. I've seen a lot of client-side modpacks with a lot of mods so I decided to make my own pack with some mods, that I've never seen in another modpack, and share it. It is unlikely that backports to older versions will be made, because this modpack is multiplayer and contains the mod [ViaFabricPlus](https://modrinth.com/mod/viafabricplus). Based on [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop), but can be laggy on low end PCs. This modpack has a total of 124 mods including libraries, if you want to request a mod, contact me via Discord kivinik.
Credits: - [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
